# Hera Streamer Invitational 2026 — Live Standings

A real-time companion site for the Hera Streamer Invitational 2026 — an
Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition tournament hosted by Hera.
Surfaces live player ratings, team standings, and tournament progression
as matches are played.

## Pages

- [Home / Players standings](https://aoe2.criticalbit.gg/kings-gauntlet/): live 1v1-ladder ratings + per-tournament games for every roster player, with a Teams tab for the same field grouped by team.

## Source

- [Frontend repository](https://github.com/ag-tech-group/hera-streamer-invitational-2026-web): React + Vite SPA.
- [API repository](https://github.com/ag-tech-group/aoe2-live-standings-api): FastAPI service that polls the AoE2 ladder and exposes standings + an SSE nudge stream.
